Lumify
Table of Contents

Namespace lumify.api.Models.Settings

Classes

AppSettings

Options bound from the App configuration section. Used to build user-facing links (e.g. the password-reset link that points at the frontend, not the API).

EmailSettings

Options bound from the Email configuration section. The actual SMTP credentials come from the mail hosting and are filled in per environment. Consumed by SmtpEmailService.

JwtSettings

Options bound from the Jwt configuration section, used to sign and validate JWT session and MFA tokens (see InternalLogic).

Made with docfx
